title: Sleep Recovery Plan
recommendation: Increase sleep by at least 1 hour tonight.
Avoid screens 30 minutes before bed.
Try a consistent bedtime routine for the next 3 days.

title: Improve Sleep Consistency
recommendation: Try sleeping at the same time every night for the next 5 days.
Reduce caffeine intake after 2 PM.
Limit late-night screen use.

title: Reduce Study Overload
recommendation: Limit continuous study sessions to 90 minutes.
Add 15 minute breaks between sessions.
Plan one relaxing activity today.

title: Improve Study Efficiency
recommendation: Use the Pomodoro technique (25min study / 5min break).
Remove phone distractions during study time.
Review study progress at the end of the day.

title: Reduce Screen Exposure
recommendation: Set a 2-hour daily phone-free block.
Disable notifications during study time.
Replace evening scrolling with reading or walking.

title: Healthy Screen Habits
recommendation: Limit social media to 30 minutes per session.
Take a 10-minute break after every 1 hour of screen use.
Use blue-light filter after sunset.

title: Increase Physical Activity
recommendation: Take a 20 minute walk today.
Stretch for 5 minutes between study sessions.
Add 30 minutes of movement to your daily routine.

title: Maintain Healthy Activity Level
recommendation: Add one extra movement break today.
Try light stretching before sleep.
Consider short exercise before studying.

title: Emotional Reset Routine
recommendation: Take a 15 minute break from academic work.
Talk to a friend or family member today.
Spend time outside or do a relaxing activity.

title: Mood Stabilization
recommendation: Take a short walk or stretch break.
Listen to music or practice breathing exercises.
Try writing down one positive thing from today.

title: Improve Life Balance
recommendation: Add a physical break after every 2 hours of studying.
Reduce study workload slightly today.
Schedule one relaxing activity tonight.

title: Maintain Healthy Routine
recommendation: Your habits look balanced today.
Continue maintaining your sleep and activity routine.
Keep monitoring your mood and energy levels.
